# Type Alias: ToPlugin()\<T, U, N>

```ts
type ToPlugin<T, U, N> = (config?: U) => PluginData<T, U, N>;

```

Factory function type returned by `toPlugin()`. Accepts optional config and returns a PluginData tuple.
